title: pyrus kandevanica
intro: Pyrus kandevanica, also known as the Persian hawthorn or Caucasian hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Caucasus region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, making it a natural remedy for cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Pyrus kandevanica include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving blood circulation, and stabilizing blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of Pyrus kandevanica include infusions, decoctions, and extracts that can be used to make teas, capsules, and tinctures.
